title: Define core data structures and error types
description: Create ActivityHandler, ActivityRegistry structs, and ActivityError enum with variants for NotFound, Timeout, ExecutionFailed, and RegistrationError. Implement Default for trivial defaults.

ActivityHandler.name: String
ActivityHandler.handler: Arc<dyn Fn(Vec<u8>) -> BoxFuture<Result<Vec<u8>, ActivityError>> + Send + Sync>

title: Implement registration methods
description: Implement register(name, version, handler, description), get(name) -> Option<ActivityHandler>, list() -> Vec<ActivityHandler>, unregister(name) -> Result<(), ActivityError>. Use name:version format for HashMap key.

get.note: Lookup by name:version or just name for latest

title: Implement activity execution with timeout
description: Implement execute(activity_name, input, timeout_duration) -> Result<Vec<u8>, ActivityError>. Wrap handler execution in tokio::time::timeout. Return Timeout error if exceeded.
verification: test timeout behavior with short timeout

title: Implement retry with exponential backoff
description: Add retry configuration to ActivityRegistry: max_retries (default 3), base_delay (default 100ms). Implement exponential backoff: delay = base_delay * 2^attempt. Log retry attempts.
verification: test retry behavior with failing activity

title: Implement built-in activities
description: Implement sleep(duration_ms) and wait_for_signal(name) as built-in activities registered on ActivityRegistry initialization. sleep uses tokio::time::sleep. wait_for_signal uses a channel-based signal mechanism.

title: Integration tests for activity registry
description: Comprehensive integration tests covering: register/get/unregister lifecycle, concurrent access, timeout enforcement, retry behavior, built-in sleep accuracy, signal send/receive.
